statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow slice: the Maintenance Minder Pocket Planner now has a guarded `Save Note` action that saves the generated checklist into local Garage Notes without changing the Garage schema or vehicle facts.

Changed:
- [maintenance.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/maintenance.html:472): added `Save Note` and clarified local Garage note behavior.
- [maintenance.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/maintenance.js:94): refactored Garage note prepending, added current-input rebuild protection, and saved planner notes into `general_notes`.
- [Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:389): added browser coverage for Save Note, storage output, brake-fluid caution preservation, and stale-input prevention.
- Updated search metadata, service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v275`, and the Anton roadmap/state/backlog/audit notes.

Verified:
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages @('maintenance.html')` passed.
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v275-minder-note-final -SkipScreenshots` passed.
- `Capture-Screenshots.ps1` hit the known screenshot helper failure, so direct Playwright fallback screenshots were captured:
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v275-minder-note-final-mobile-maintenance.png`
  - `debug-screenshots/audit-v275-minder-note-final-desktop-maintenance.png`

Next clean slice: real-device review of the Minder Save Note wording and saved Garage Notes output before adding similar save-to-note behavior for Service Prep.
